# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent linkerd authz missing.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-http
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-api
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-proxy
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-proxy
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth-service
  port: 8443
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector
  namespace: monitoring
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: prometheus
  port: 9091
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend-sa
          namespace: production
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-auth
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-service
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend-sa
          namespace: production
---

  namespace: production

  server:
    name: payment-service
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api-sa
          namespace: production
---

    matchLabels:
      app: admin-api
  port: 8888
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: admin-restricted-access
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: admin-api
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: admin-console-sa
          namespace: production
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: internal-grpc
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: grpc-service
  port: 50051
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: grpc-service-access
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: internal-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api-sa
          namespace: production
        - name: payment-service-sa
          namespace: production
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: cache-redis
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: redis
  port: 6379
  proxyProtocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: cache-access
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: cache-redis
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api-sa
          namespace: production
        - name: frontend-sa
          namespace: production
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: message-queue
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: rabbitmq
  port: 5672
  proxyProtocol: TCP
---

kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: queue-publishers
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: message-queue
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api-sa
          namespace: production
        - name: payment-service-sa
          namespace: production
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: webhook-receiver
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webhook-service
  port: 8000
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: webhook-internal-only
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: webhook-receiver
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payment-service-sa
          namespace: production
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: audit-logger
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: audit-service
  port: 8200
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: audit-log-writers
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: audit-logger
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend-sa
          namespace: production
        - name: backend-api-sa
          namespace: production
        - name: payment-service-sa
          namespace: production
        - name: auth-service-sa
          namespace: production
        - name: admin-console-sa
          namespace: production
